problem id: 4f27a061
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3)

examples:
  00111010 -> 00000111
  11101100 -> 00011101
  00111100 -> 00000111
  01001110 -> 00001001
  11111111 -> 00011111
  10010101 -> 00010010
  10001011 -> 00010001
  11010100 -> 00011010

query: 11110111
predicted answer: 00011110
